title: kinsei by nobi nobita or gekkou touzoku wtv

wikitext:
[]: kinsei by nobi nobita (or gekkou touzoku wtv)             Quote Post by ottorifle » Sat Apr 12, 2025 5:20 pm okay hi im otto i have checked the ends of the freaking internet for this and im stumped so this is my second to last resort before i learn Japanese just to translate this myself. did i make this account literally right before posting this? yes. i did. i am not ashamed (i am a little..) i found this doujin called kinsei by nobi nobita. the author was one of the ppl who illustrated the episode 24 drafts, and made some other works that were recognized by anno and sadamoto. now, with kinsei, i really. really. really wanna read it but i have checked fucking EVERYWHERE and could not find a single english translation. i asked reddit because desperate times call for desperate measures, and the most i could get was a summary. so if anybody has a translation/can translate i implore you to share with the class.. this is the doujin btw.. cw for nsfw website and sexual imagery: [link removed] please tell me if this is against any rules btw!! i checked but i dont know how to use this site, i have the tech skills of a grandma..

[]: Re: kinsei by nobi nobita (or gekkou touzoku wtv)             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Sat Apr 12, 2025 7:53 pm Sorry, but I removed the link due the sexual content. And if anyone has a link to this doujin in English, please send a private message to the requester.
